backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the bakery app defining menu items, customer rewards, user profiles, and admin/user access control with CRUD operations for menu management, rewards configuration, and purchase tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented bakery features (visual theme, homepage, menu page, admin auth, admin panel, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and any notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Menu, Rewards, and Admin pages inside a shared Layout with Navigation, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/MenuItemFo: Form component for creating or editing a menu item with fields for name, description, price, category, availability, and image URL, wired to add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/MenuManage: Admin component that lists all menu items with thumbnail, availability badge, and category label, and provides add, edit, and delete actions via dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/RecordPurc: A form component that allows admins to record a purchase for a customer by entering their Principal ID and item count, then calling the recordPurchase mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/RewardsMan: An admin panel component for managing the rewards program, including updating the rewards threshold, looking up customer rewards by Principal, and manually adjusting customer rewards.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name to create a profile, blocking interaction until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A site footer displaying the bakery brand, hours, rewards program info, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A sticky navigation header with desktop and mobile menus, Internet Identity login/logout, and a conditional admin link shown only to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuItemCar: A card component that displays a single menu item with its image, category badge, name, price, and description.
frontend/src/components/rewards/RewardsS: Displays a customer's rewards dashboard including items purchased, free treats available, progress toward the next treat, and a button to claim a free treat.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, menu items, and rewards configuration/management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining a warm bakery-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that gates access behind authentication and admin role checks, then renders tabbed Menu and Rewards management sections.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, a three-feature highlights grid, and a call-to-action section linking to the menu and rewards pages.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu page that fetches and groups available menu items by category, rendering them in ordered sections with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Displays the customer rewards page, showing a login prompt for unauthenticated users or the RewardsStatus component with progress data for authenticated users, and triggers a ProfileSetupModal if no profile exists.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with a warm bakery-themed design system including custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato, Dancing Script), OKLCH-based color tokens, warm box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a bakery website, listing implemented features, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for a public menu, admin panel, and customer rewards program.
